body: This reverts commit 9c2b29f4f90ef6725177e519fad02ee28468202d. That commit updated to use JuliaFormatter v2, but that release has been yanked, so here we return to v1.
title: Revert "new version of formatter plus formatting changes"

body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
I missed a few updated in #831; this PR finishes updating to use Julia v1.11 everywhere
title: finish Julia v1.11 updates

body:
- [x] add diagnostics: net radiation, latent heat flux, sensible heat flux, ground heat flux
- [x] add `diagnostics_as_vector` function, to get diagnostics from DictWriters
- [x] use diagnostics in `run_fluxnet`
- [x] add water runoff for single site experiment (fluxnet)

closes #788
title: Refactor to use diagnostics throughout
